title: Pick the Real-Time Transport That Won’t Bite
meta_description: Cut API latency 80% with the right real-time transport in 2026 — WebSocket, SSE, or long-poll benchmarks and cost data on Node 20 and Redis 7.2.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for everything and regret it.

SSE is simpler, cheaper, and works on Safari.

Here is what actually paid off 👇
